commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Signal native exec/plugin approval delivery, thumbs-up/thumbs-down reaction resolution, explicit approver and target-author checks, persistent reaction bindings, monitor runtime context wiring, and focused Signal approval tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR, not a bug report. Source inspection shows current main has only Signal approval auth, while the PR adds the native approval and reaction runtime.
commands.review_followup: This should stay with human/maintainer review because the remaining blocker is live Signal proof or an explicit approval-security override, not a narrow code repair.

target.title: feat(signal): support reaction approvals
target.body:
Summary

- Add Signal native exec/plugin approval capability gated by top-level approvals configuration.
- Add thumbs-up / thumbs-down reaction approval handling for allow-once and deny, with explicit Signal approver auth.
- Bind reactions only from native approval delivery, verify target-author identity, persist binding state, and re-check current approval route config before resolving.

Verification

- [x] node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/signal/src/approval-auth.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-handler.runtime.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-reactions.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-native.test.ts extensions/signal/src/send.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.inbound-context.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor.tool-result.sends-tool-summaries-responseprefix.test.ts
- [x] pnpm tsgo:extensions && pnpm lint:extensions:no-src-outside-plugin-sdk && git diff --check
- [x] Manual dev.review loop passes addressed target route gating, target-author verification, generic send trust boundary, reaction hint binding, and persisted route re-checks.

Behavior addressed: Signal can deliver approval prompts through native approval delivery and resolve authorized 👍 / 👎 reactions as allow-once / deny.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/signal/src/approval-auth.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-handler.runtime.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-reactions.test.ts extensions/signal/src/approval-native.test.ts extensions/signal/src/send.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.inbound-context.test.ts extensions/signal/src/monitor.tool-result.sends-tool-summaries-responseprefix.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 7 test files passed, 56 tests passed.
Observed result after fix: extension typecheck, plugin SDK boundary check, and diff whitespace check passed.
What was not tested: live Signal transport/reaction roundtrip against a real Signal account.
target.author: kevinslin
